Patch Set 10: Code-Review-1

(48 comments)

in many places error checks are just wasteful, especially when  local buffers are get. If client allocates request and pack it successfully then all buffers must exist, the only reason for checking them could be internal code logic correctness and assertion is the most appropriate for that. The same is true for server side and all reply buffers.

commit.subject: LU-4629 ptlrpc: fix NULL pointer dereference
commit.message:
LU-4629 ptlrpc: fix NULL pointer dereference

Pointer returned from call to function 'req_capsule_client_get'
or 'req_capsule_server_get' may be NULL and will be dereferenced.

Signed-off-by: Dmitry Eremin <dmitry.eremin@intel.com>
Change-Id: I3b2b1083f7746169925c8f0732a57c60206ca0c1
